snippets.name: 代理 Clone GitHub
snippets.content:
#!/bin/zsh
set -euo pipefail

PROXY="http://127.0.0.1:7890"
export http_proxy="$PROXY"
export https_proxy="$PROXY"
export HTTP_PROXY="$PROXY"
export HTTPS_PROXY="$PROXY"
export ALL_PROXY="$PROXY"

cd %d || exit 1

echo "工作目录: $(pwd)"
echo "代理: $PROXY"

if ! curl -fsS --max-time 3 -x "$PROXY" https://github.com >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "警告: 无法通过 $PROXY 访问 GitHub，请确认本地代理（端口 7890）已开启。" >&2
fi

echo ">>> git clone …"
git -c http.proxy="$PROXY" -c https.proxy="$PROXY" clone -- %ask{请输入 GitHub 仓库 URL}

echo "完成。"
